================================================================================
Itemize with parantheses in square brackets of item
================================================================================

\begin{itemize}
	\item[(i)] bar
\end{itemize}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (generic_environment
    (begin
      (curly_group_text
        (text
          (word))))
    (enum_item
      (brack_group_text
        (text
          (word)))
      (text
        (word)))
    (end
      (curly_group_text
        (text
          (word))))))

================================================================================
Author block with square brackets
================================================================================

\author{A\footnotemark[1] \and B}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (author_declaration
    (curly_group_author_list
      (author
        (text
          (word)
          (generic_command
            (command_name)))
        (text
          (word)))
      (command_name)
      (author
        (text
          (word))))))

================================================================================
input with no curly braces
================================================================================

\input abc

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (latex_include
    (path)))

================================================================================
newcommand with body inside
================================================================================

\newcommand{\ben}{\begin{enumerate}}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (new_command_definition
    (curly_group_command_name
      (command_name))
    (curly_group_impl
      (begin
        (curly_group_text
          (text
            (word)))))))

================================================================================
caption without body
================================================================================

\newcommand{\tabcaption}{\caption}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (new_command_definition
    (curly_group_command_name
      (command_name))
    (curly_group_impl
      (caption))))

================================================================================
item with inline math
================================================================================

\begin{enumerate}
    \item [$B_1:$]
    \item [$$B_1:$$]
\end{enumerate}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (generic_environment
    (begin
      (curly_group_text
        (text
          (word))))
    (enum_item
      (brack_group_text
        (inline_formula
          (text
            (word)
            (subscript
              (letter))
            (operator)))))
    (enum_item
      (brack_group_text
        (displayed_equation
          (text
            (word)
            (subscript
              (letter))
            (operator)))))
    (end
      (curly_group_text
        (text
          (word))))))

================================================================================
curly braces in item square brackets
================================================================================

\begin{enumerate}
    \item [{$B_1:$}]
    \item [{{$$B_1:$$}}]
\end{enumerate}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (generic_environment
    (begin
      (curly_group_text
        (text
          (word))))
    (enum_item
      (brack_group_text
        (curly_group
          (inline_formula
            (text
              (word)
              (subscript
                (letter))
              (operator))))))
    (enum_item
      (brack_group_text
        (curly_group
          (curly_group
            (displayed_equation
              (text
                (word)
                (subscript
                  (letter))
                (operator)))))))
    (end
      (curly_group_text
        (text
          (word))))))

================================================================================
curly braces in item square brackets
================================================================================

\begin{enumerate}
    \item [{$B_1:$}]
    \item [{{$$B_1:$$}}]
\end{enumerate}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (generic_environment
    (begin
      (curly_group_text
        (text
          (word))))
    (enum_item
      (brack_group_text
        (curly_group
          (inline_formula
            (text
              (word)
              (subscript
                (letter))
              (operator))))))
    (enum_item
      (brack_group_text
        (curly_group
          (curly_group
            (displayed_equation
              (text
                (word)
                (subscript
                  (letter))
                (operator)))))))
    (end
      (curly_group_text
        (text
          (word))))))

================================================================================
label/ref with parantheses
================================================================================

\label{f(opt)-table}
\ref{f(opt)-table}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (label_definition
    (curly_group_label
      (label)))
  (label_reference
    (curly_group_label_list
      (label))))

================================================================================
\iff in math envs
================================================================================

$$\begin{array}{rc}
\iff
\end{array}$$

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (displayed_equation
    (math_environment
      (begin
        (curly_group_text
          (text
            (word))))
      (curly_group
        (text
          (word)))
      (iff_command)
      (end
        (curly_group_text
          (text
            (word)))))))

================================================================================
Rewrite ~ as new command
================================================================================

\gdef~{abc}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (old_command_definition
    (command_name)
    (curly_group_impl
      (text
        (word)))))

================================================================================
Negative counter values
================================================================================

\setcounter{section}{-1}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (counter_definition
    (curly_group_word
      (word))
    (curly_group_value
      (value_literal))))

================================================================================
Allow various characters in label/ref
================================================================================

\label{,}
\ref{,}
\label{$}
\ref{$}
\label{$$$$}
\ref{$$$$}
\label{[]}
\ref{[]}
\label{=}
\ref{=}
\label{^}
\ref{^}
\label{~}
\ref{~}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (label_definition
    (curly_group_label
      (label)))
  (label_reference
    (curly_group_label_list
      (label)))
  (label_definition
    (curly_group_label
      (label)))
  (label_reference
    (curly_group_label_list
      (label)))
  (label_definition
    (curly_group_label
      (label)))
  (label_reference
    (curly_group_label_list
      (label)))
  (label_definition
    (curly_group_label
      (label)))
  (label_reference
    (curly_group_label_list
      (label)))
  (label_definition
    (curly_group_label
      (label)))
  (label_reference
    (curly_group_label_list
      (label)))
  (label_definition
    (curly_group_label
      (label)))
  (label_reference
    (curly_group_label_list
      (label)))
  (label_definition
    (curly_group_label
      (label)))
  (label_reference
    (curly_group_label_list
      (label))))

================================================================================
Better parsing of old command definition
================================================================================

\def\cmdA#1{#1}
\gdef\cmdB#1{#1}
\edef\cmdC#1{#1}
\xdef\cmdD#1{#1}

\def\cmdA#1#2{#1#2}
\gdef\cmdB#1#2{#1#2}
\edef\cmdC#1#2{#1#2}
\xdef\cmdD#1#2{#1#2}

\def\cmdA{}
\gdef\cmdB{}
\edef\cmdC{}
\xdef\cmdD{}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (old_command_definition
    (command_name)
    (placeholder)
    (curly_group_impl
      (text
        (placeholder))))
  (old_command_definition
    (command_name)
    (placeholder)
    (curly_group_impl
      (text
        (placeholder))))
  (old_command_definition
    (command_name)
    (placeholder)
    (curly_group_impl
      (text
        (placeholder))))
  (old_command_definition
    (command_name)
    (placeholder)
    (curly_group_impl
      (text
        (placeholder))))
  (old_command_definition
    (command_name)
    (placeholder)
    (placeholder)
    (curly_group_impl
      (text
        (placeholder)
        (placeholder))))
  (old_command_definition
    (command_name)
    (placeholder)
    (placeholder)
    (curly_group_impl
      (text
        (placeholder)
        (placeholder))))
  (old_command_definition
    (command_name)
    (placeholder)
    (placeholder)
    (curly_group_impl
      (text
        (placeholder)
        (placeholder))))
  (old_command_definition
    (command_name)
    (placeholder)
    (placeholder)
    (curly_group_impl
      (text
        (placeholder)
        (placeholder))))
  (old_command_definition
    (command_name)
    (curly_group_impl))
  (old_command_definition
    (command_name)
    (curly_group_impl))
  (old_command_definition
    (command_name)
    (curly_group_impl))
  (old_command_definition
    (command_name)
    (curly_group_impl)))

================================================================================
Allow placeholders in ref/label
================================================================================

\def\figref#1{figure~\ref{#1}}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (old_command_definition
    (command_name)
    (placeholder)
    (curly_group_impl
      (text
        (word)
        (label_reference
          (curly_group_label_list
            (label
              (placeholder))))))))

================================================================================
Commands are allowed to contain numbers if it is not the first letter
================================================================================

\def\CRIKEY3{CRIKEY3}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (old_command_definition
    (command_name)
    (curly_group_impl
      (text
        (word)))))

================================================================================
Optional arguments for newenvironment definitions
================================================================================

\newenvironment{envname}[3][default_value]{Argument1: #1\\Argument2: #2\\Argument3: #3}{\textbf{END}}
\newenvironment{envname}[1]{}{\textbf{END}}
\newenvironment{envname}{}{\textbf{END}}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (environment_definition
    (curly_group_text
      (text
        (word)))
    (brack_group_argc
      (argc))
    (brack_group
      (text
        (word)
        (subscript
          (letter))
        (word)))
    (curly_group_impl
      (text
        (word)
        (placeholder)
        (generic_command
          (command_name))
        (word)
        (placeholder)
        (generic_command
          (command_name))
        (word)
        (placeholder)))
    (curly_group_impl
      (generic_command
        (command_name)
        (curly_group
          (text
            (word))))))
  (environment_definition
    (curly_group_text
      (text
        (word)))
    (brack_group_argc
      (argc))
    (curly_group_impl)
    (curly_group_impl
      (generic_command
        (command_name)
        (curly_group
          (text
            (word))))))
  (environment_definition
    (curly_group_text
      (text
        (word)))
    (curly_group_impl)
    (curly_group_impl
      (generic_command
        (command_name)
        (curly_group
          (text
            (word)))))))

================================================================================
Parse \long in front of command definitions
================================================================================

\long\def\Ignore#1{}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(source_file
  (long_command_definition
    (old_command_definition
      (command_name)
      (placeholder)
      (curly_group_impl))))
